usage: report_inactive_arcs [-help] [<instance_or_port_list>] [-exclude_type {const snipped disable library_disable global_disable conditional_disable Library_Mode power_mode_disable}] [-include_net_arcs] [-include_when_cond] [-type {const snipped disable library_disable global_disable conditional_disable Library_Mode power_mode_disable}] [-view <view_name>] [> <filename[.gz]>] [>> <filename[.gz]>] [-delay_arcs_only  | -check_arcs_only ]

options.name: <instance_or_port_list>
options.description: Specifies list of instances or ports

options.name: -delay_arcs_only
options.description: lists only disabled timing delay arcs

options.name: -exclude_type
options.description: {const snipped disable library_disable global_disable conditional_disable Library_Mode power_mode_disable} Excludes the disabled arcs that belong to this category of disabled arcs

options.name: -include_net_arcs
options.description: Includes disabled net arcs in the report

options.name: -include_when_cond
options.description: When cond disabled condition is printed in detailed info

options.name: -type
options.description: {const snipped disable library_disable global_disable conditional_disable Library_Mode power_mode_disable} Lists only the disabled arcs that belong to this category of disabled arcs

options.name: -view
options.description: Generates the report for the specified analysis view only (string, optional) > <filename[.gz]> # Redirects output to the specified file (redirect_operator, optional) >> <filename[.gz]> # Redirects output to the specified file
